View All Services > Previous Next 80 + Years of Experience 36 Specialities 300 + Experienced Doctors 1 Million+ Patients Healed Legend of Holy Family Hospital: The Legacy of Mother Giovanna In the year 1978, Mother Giovanna arrived in Mumbai to take over the Holy Family Hospital which was handed over to the Ursuline Sisters of Mary Immaculate from the Medical Mission Sisters. Mother Giovanna was the pioneer and primary architect behind its phenomenal growth. Her gentle healing hands and magnanimous heart won over the hearts and minds of the Bandra community and the hospital soon gained a good reputation, especially as a maternity home. She extended ...
